seoTitle: Glen Martin vs Glen Nevis — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Glen Martin and Glen Nevis. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Glen Martin vs Glen Nevis: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Martin and Glen Nevis.
heading: Glen Martin vs Glen Nevis — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Martin, New South Wales and Glen Nevis, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Nevis has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Glen Martin (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Martin or Glen Nevis safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Martin has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Glen Nevis scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Martin scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Nevis scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Martin or Glen Nevis?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Nevis has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
